items.title: Five dead following shooting at youth centre in Stade, northern Germany
items.summary: Two people have been arrested, one of whom is a suspect, police say.

items.title: Billion-Dollar Program Connects 50 Million People to the Power Grid Across Africa
items.summary: 50 million Africans living in 40 countries now have access to electricity for the first time thanks to a $15 billion development initiative by the World Bank and African Development Bank Group (ADB).…
